title: A Basic Class & Method
prompt_md: Define a `Counter` class with a `value` attribute starting at `0` and an `inc()` method that adds 1 to `value`. Then write `count_to(n)` that creates a `Counter`, calls `inc()` `n` times, and returns the final `value`.
hints: In `count_to`, loop `for _ in range(n): c.inc()` then return `c.value`.
